# Zero Zero Guild

> The inner circle for venture-funded cofounders. Seed to Exit.

Zero Zero Guild works directly with cofounding teams so their relationship becomes the strongest part of the company. 60% of companies fail because of cofounder problems. Zero Zero Guild exists to make sure yours isn't one of them.

## What We Do

- Direct cofounder work on communication, negotiation, decision rights, and conflict
- Sealed peer groups of 5-6 cofounding teams, in person, monthly, NDA-sealed
- A vetted network of Seed-to-exited founders where each stage learns from the stage ahead

## Who We Are

- Jonah Larkin: Former founder, Stanford GSB coach/facilitator. Facilitates interpersonal dynamics at Stanford's Graduate School of Business. Works directly with cofounders on negotiation, decision rights, conflict, and the conversations most teams avoid.
- Arthur Levitan: Former founder who scaled a nine-figure startup, Daoist master. Applies first-principles frameworks from the Dao De Ching — battle-tested wisdom for founders under pressure.

## Who This Is For

Venture-funded cofounders from Seed stage through Exit. You have a cofounder. You're building something real. The cofounder relationship is either your greatest asset or your biggest liability.

## How We're Different

We're not executive coaches, accelerators, or therapists. We've been the founders staring failure in the face. Frameworks from Stanford GSB and ancient first principles — tested under real pressure, not borrowed from a textbook.

## Contact

- Website: https://zerozeroguild.com
- Email: hello@zerozeroguild.com
